summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of CineMatch React Native Expo app. All core features working perfectly including hero section, algorithm pills, state management, navigation, and UI interactions.
passed_tests: Hero section renders with The Dream Architect poster, title, tagline, Play/More Info buttons
All genres (Sci-Fi, Thriller, Mind-Bending) display correctly
All 10 algorithm pills visible in horizontal scroll: TF-IDF, KNN, SVD, ALS, Apriori, NCF, RBM, LightGBM, Word2Vec, Multi-Armed Bandit
SVD (Matrix Factorization) correctly set as default with red highlight
Algorithm switching functionality works - clicking TF-IDF updates state and description
Algorithm description box updates dynamically when switching algorithms
Movie preview row shows 8 movie poster cards with titles, ratings, and years
Tab navigation between Home and Explore works correctly
Algorithm Library page shows all 10 algorithms with descriptions
All buttons (Play, More Info) are clickable and responsive
Zustand state management working correctly with mocked data
Loading states and transitions work smoothly
